name: Teatime Shortbread - Bon Appetit
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup (1 1/2 sticks) unsalted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Using an electric mixer, beat the butter and sugar in a bowl until well combined.
3. Sift the flour and salt into the butter mixture.
4. Using fingertips, rub the mixture until moist clumps form.
5. Gently knead the dough until it forms a soft texture.
6. Divide the dough into two portions.
7. Press one portion of dough to form a 9 1/2-inch round, about 1/4 inch thick on a baking sheet.
8. Roll the cookie lightly with a rolling pin to smooth the top.
9. Using a 3-inch diameter cookie cutter, cut out eight cookies. Reserve the scraps.
10. Repeat pressing, rolling, and cutting with the remaining dough portion.
11. Gather the dough scraps together, press them to form a round shape, and cut out additional cookies.
12. Arrange the cookies on two large baking sheets.
13. Pierce each cookie several times with a fork.
14. Bake until pale golden, about 12 minutes.
15. Cool slightly on the baking sheets, then transfer the cookies to racks to cool completely.
